dict.string: Boo
Boo
AppIcon
com.boo.app
Boo
APPL
A program running within Boo would like to use AppleScript.
A program running within Boo would like to access your system's audio.
A program running within Boo would like to use Bluetooth.
A program running within Boo would like to access your Calendar.
A program running within Boo would like to use the camera.
A program running within Boo would like to access your Contacts.
A program running within Boo would like to access your Desktop folder.
A program running within Boo would like to access your Documents folder.
A program running within Boo would like to access your Downloads folder.
A program running within Boo would like to access the local network.
A program running within Boo would like to access your location information.
A program running within Boo would like to use your microphone.
A program running within Boo would like to access motion data.
A program running within Boo would like to access your Photo Library.
NSApplication
A program running within Boo would like to access your reminders.
A program running within Boo would like to use speech recognition.
A program running within Boo requires elevated privileges.
